headline: Is It Time To Reassess Realty Income (O) After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Realty Income at around US$59.75 represents a fair deal or if the market is missing something in the price shown on screen. The stock is up 4.3% year to date and 13.0% over the last year, even though it has fallen 3.1% in the past week and 6.0% over the past month. These moves can leave investors questioning whether recent price changes reflect shifting growth expectations or changes in perceived risk. Recent headlines have focused on Realty Income's role...
